title: Rules and regulations
doc_html:
§2715.  Rules and regulations

The department may adopt rules and regulations as necessary to implement the provisions of this Chapter in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act.

Acts 1990, No. 587, §1, eff. July 19, 1990.
